com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.pinentry

Class CipherPAN

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.pinentry.CipherPAN
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExtendedCipherPAN

    public class CipherPAN
extends java.lang.Object
    PAN that is encrypted by protection key.

      Gets encrypted PAN data.

      Gets length of clear PAN.

      Gets the key which is used to encrypt the plain PAN.

      Sets encrypted PAN data.

    • Method Detail

      • getPANKey

        public Key getPANKey()
        Gets the key which is used to encrypt the plain PAN.
        Returns:
        Key which is used to encrypt the plain PAN.
        • Key ID value range: [129-255].
        • Key type: KeyType.DES, KeyType.AES

      • setPANKey

        public void setPANKey(Key panKey)
        Sets the key which is used to encrypt the plain PAN.
        Parameters:
        panKey - Key which is used to encrypt the plain PAN.
        • Key ID value range: [129-255]
        • Key type: KeyType.DES, KeyType.AES

      • getCipherPAN

        public byte[] getCipherPAN()
        Gets encrypted PAN data.
        Returns:
        Encrypted PAN data.

      • setCipherPAN

        public void setCipherPAN(byte[] cipherPAN)
        Sets encrypted PAN data.
        Parameters:
        cipherPAN - Encrypted PAN data.

      • getClearPANLen

        public int getClearPANLen()
        Gets length of clear PAN.
        Returns:
        Length of clear PAN.

      • setClearPANLen

        public void setClearPANLen(int clearPANLen)
        Sets length of clear PAN.
        Parameters:
        clearPANLen - Length of clear PAN.
